input.name: firstName
input.description: Customer first name to be stored in the new customer record.
Customer last name to be stored in the new customer record.
input.name: lastName

input.description: Primary email address used for account communication and login notifications.
input.name: email

input.description: Mobile phone number that will be associated with the customer profile.
input.name: phoneNumber

input.description: Indicates whether the customer agrees to receive promotional communication.
input.name: marketingConsent

operation.description: Validate required fields such as firstName, lastName, and email before processing the request.
Check whether the provided email address already exists in the customer database to prevent duplicate accounts.
Create a new customer record and persist personal, contact, and consent information.
Build a clean success payload that includes the new customerId, status, and creation timestamp.
Serialize the success result as JSON and return it to the frontend consumer.

output.name: customerId
output.description: Unique identifier generated for the newly created customer.

output.name: status
output.description: Current lifecycle state of the created customer record.

output.name: createdAt
output.description: Timestamp indicating when the customer record was created.

name: Add New Customer
description: This API creates a new customer record in the customer management system. It validates the incoming customer payload, prevents duplicate email registration, stores the new profile, and returns the generated customer identifier together with creation metadata.
